records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Typified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Typifying.]

defs: To represent by an image, form, model, or resemblance.
quotes: Our Savior was typified, indeed, by the goat that was slain, and the scapegoat in the wilderness.

defs: To embody the essential or salient characteristics of; to be the type of; as, the genus Rosa typifies the family Rosaceae, which in turn typifies the series Rosales.
